title: melicope clusiifolia
intro: Melicope clusiifolia, also known as the variegated melicope, is a small shrub native to Hawaii and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of plants. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its ability to promote overall health and wellness, with potential benefits including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Melicope clusiifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
